reason: Arithmetic reconciles: total=19, by_fr sums (FR-01=6+FR-02=7+FR-03=4+NFR-01=1+NFR-03=1=19) match by_layer sums (unit=11+integration=7+benchmark=1=19) match matrix §2/§3.
